decisions.name: check_if_deleted_item_has_BMD
decisions.label: check if deleted item has BMD

Flow.description: Allows the GRLs to submit proposed changes to their baseline measure details
Flow.interviewLabel: GMS - Change Control Request Form - Baseline Measure Details v23 {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form - Baseline Measure Details v2

fields.name: HelpText
fields.fieldText:
Guidance

  • If you want to remove any of the baseline measures, please set the Updated Measure KPI value to 0.
